title: Margbensonia elata
taxonomy: Margbensonia elata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a part of the genus Margbensonia, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Margbensonia elata places it as a member of the clade Asterids, within the larger clade Angiosperms. The plant's classification suggests that it shares characteristics with other flowering plants in the Rubiaceae family. Further research into the plant's classification may be necessary to determine its exact relationships within the plant kingdom.
uses: Margbensonia elata is a plant species that has been reported to have various medicinal uses, although the information available is limited. The plant has been traditionally used in some cultures to treat a range of health issues, including fever and gastrointestinal problems. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of using Margbensonia elata as a medicinal agent.
